holdings.infoBox: BAMG is an equity ETF with a total of 101 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 4.90%, Eli Lilly and Company at 4.39%, Alphabet at 4.38%, Broadcom at 4.21%, and Apple at 4.08%.

overview.description: The Brookstone Growth Stock ETF (BAMG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively selects US companies with strong earnings growth potential based on proprietary and third party research. It selects both mid- to large-cap stocks with a focus on the latter. BAMG was launched on Sep 27, 2023 and is issued by Brookstone.
